commits.author: Jon Seager
commits.message:
Merge pull request #83 from brlin-tw/content-snap

Migrate to use the FFmpeg content snap

commits.author: 林博仁(Buo-ren Lin)
commits.message:
Migrate to use the FFmpeg content snap

This patch:

  • Migrates the base to core24
  • Replaces FFmpeg and its dependencies with the FFmpeg Content Snap, which ships a more recent version(7.1.1 at the moment)
  • Replaces mesa packages with the ones provided by the mesa-2404 content snap
  • Introduces a wrapper to bypass Snapcraft’s application executable existence checks as the app commands are now provided by the content snaps

Fixes #77.

Signed-off-by: 林博仁(Buo-ren Lin) buo.ren.lin@gmail.com
